query:
SELECT lu.displayName, s.plan, s.status, s.currentPeriodEnd
FROM line_users lu
JOIN subscriptions s ON s.userId = lu.id
WHERE lu.id IN (30001, 60001, 480001);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3J5KDBVUjsrxvHe.root --database cX9NcQmb35cA4KMDW3eQdK --execute SELECT lu.displayName, s.plan, s.status, s.currentPeriodEnd
FROM line_users lu
JOIN subscriptions s ON s.userId = lu.id
WHERE lu.id IN (30001, 60001, 480001);
